'''''From Putty to Pixels''''' is a softbound book included with the Limited Edition release of ''[[Sculpting a Galaxy: Inside the Star Wars Model Shop]]''. It features computer graphic renderings of digital models from the ''[[Star Wars]]'' films.

{{Book-stub}}
